text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the URA Finale comes to a close as a
great success.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Elation! Jubilation! My heart is full of emotion!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume sprinting towards the crown with
all their strength! The trainers watching over them
proudly from the sidelines!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: And through it all, the cheering of the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Resplendent! This is the true brilliance of
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Behold, Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
See how the Umamusume work tirelessly toward
the next shining stage with hope in their hearts!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
This is the scene I dreamed of! This is my ideal
realized!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Once again... Thank you! This would never have
come into being without you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However... This is far from the end. Indeed, it's
only the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is only one stage upon which our
beloved Umamusume may shine!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Rejoice! The possibilities of Umamusume are
endless!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I suppose that means we have many busy
days ahead of us... Isn't that right, Director?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indeed!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can rely on your continued support of this
school and its Umamusume, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa's passionate speech stirs me to
my core, and I can't help but feel proud.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly emotional. It's a privilege to have met a
trainer like you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Now, onwards! Our work is far from done!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
There can never be too many stages for
Umamusume to shine upon!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can count on you to support the
Umamusume who will lead the future, Trainer!
